title: goodenia cirrifica
intro: Goodenia cirrifica, also known as Tick-tack or Tick-tack plant, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Goodenia cirrifica include its ability to soothe sore throats, relieve congestion, and aid in the reduction of inflammation. Goodenia cirrifica can be prepared as a tea or infusion by infusing the leaves in hot water, which is said to be an effective way to harness its medicinal properties.
